content:
✨ UnrealGenAISupport | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable Unreal Engine developers to easily integrate and leverage cutting-edge LLM and Generative AI capabilities for in-game content creation, dynamic world generation, and intelligent NPC behavior.
✨ Key Features: • Integration of multiple LLM/GenAI APIs (OpenAI, Deepseek, Claude, Gemini, Qwen, Kimi, Grok)
📖 Summary: This Unreal Engine plugin integrates various Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI (GenAI) models directly into the game development workflow. It simplifies the process of using AI for tasks like scene generation, NPC behavior, and content creation within Unreal Engine, supporting a wide range of popular AI APIs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
